Home

Improv

  • MATES: The Improvised ’90s Sitcom

    An improvised parody of the best sitcoms of the ’90s, co-created with Rachel E. Thorn and Hugh Clark. Awarded Best Improv Show at Edinburgh Fringe 2022 by Theatre Weekly.

    MATES website

  • The British Improv Project

    A cooperative nonprofit which runs improv retreats two or three times a year.

    I'm jointly responsible for programming the event, a member of the welfare team, a workshop leader and the organisation's de facto webmaster and graphic designer.

    BIP website

  • Stürike!

    A multi-disciplinary comedy collective, currently developing longform improv shows in Sheffield. I’m a founding member and coach the group's improv troupe with Bobby Anderson.

    Stürike! website

  • The Sheffield Improv Jam

    The heart of the improv scene in Sheffield. I founded and host the event with Bobby Anderson.

    Sheffield Improv Jam on Meetup.com

  • Joined at the Quip

    My improv duo with Bobby Anderson. We perform a variety of formats focusing on on characters and relationships, treading the line between heartfelt and hilarious.

  • Lying Together (2017–2025)

    An award-winning black comedy about sex and deception, inspired by true anonymous confessions from the audience, created withRachel E. Thorn.

    Lying Together website
